title: ORDER BY with Row_number() return wrong results
bug_features_seed: SELECT `customer`, `product`, @rank := IF(@prev_customer = `customer`, @rank + 1, 1) AS `rank`, @prev_customer := `customer` FROM `table1`, (SELECT @rank := 0, @prev_customer := NULL) AS vars ORDER BY `customer`, `price` DESC;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY with Row_number() produces incorrect results
